expectations.text: Identifies Microservices and Service-Based as the top 2 candidates
expectations.evidence: Recommends Microservices. Mentions Service-Based as alternative at the end.

expectations.text: Shows a ranked table with fit scores for all 8 architecture styles
expectations.evidence: No ranked table. No fit scores. Only discusses 4 candidate styles in prose.

expectations.text: Acknowledges close scores and discusses qualifying context
expectations.evidence: Does not acknowledge close scores. Goes directly to Microservices recommendation. Service-Based only mentioned as a brief alternative.

expectations.text: Considers team structure as a factor
expectations.evidence: Mentions 3 teams mapping to services and platform team need.
5-step migration strategy with extraction order (checkout first, then catalog, then fulfillment).

expectations.text: Updates architecture.md with Selected Architecture Style section
expectations.evidence: architecture.md has Selected Architecture section, but minimal (no tradeoffs, no evolution path in the file itself).
